acceptance.acceptance_statement: Iteration 8 passes if hidden steering, stale context/support/proxy, out-of-envelope proxy, budget ambiguity, native relabeling, A7/GALI7 inheritance, and claim-promotion controls all fail closed with distinct primary blockers. No control may fail only generically.

control_records.reason: A hidden context override cannot satisfy source-backed context transfer.
A stale route-context digest cannot remain source-current over the replay window.
Support-state evidence must be source-current; stale support cannot pass.
Proxy evidence must cite current same-band or 4-B variant digests.
A proxy target outside the declared envelope cannot inherit the 4-B result.
Memory, proxy, support, and node-plus-packet budget surfaces must remain distinct.
A nonzero node-plus-packet budget error breaks the longer-horizon gate.
Report-side steering cannot decide which rows pass the matrix or horizon.
Producer-mediated artifact evidence cannot be relabelled native without Phase 8 support.
GALI6 does not imply A7 by inheritance.
GALI6 does not imply GALI7 by inheritance.
Direct claim-promotion fields are rejected regardless of positive transfer evidence.
